name: Your Name
title: Aspiring Data Scientist · AI/ML Enthusiast
tagline: I turn messy data into decisions — currently building my path through analytics, machine learning, and applied AI.
bio: I'm building a career in data analytics and AI/ML, one course and one project at a time. My background is in [your degree/field], and over the past [timeframe] I've been deliberately stacking practical skills — from SQL and Python to machine learning fundamentals — through structured coursework and hands-on projects.
I care about clarity over complexity: a good model or dashboard should make a decision easier, not just look impressive. That's the standard I hold my own work to.
Outside of coursework, I like documenting what I learn so it's useful to the next person figuring out the same things I am.
